name: Scallops with Fresh Pineapple (Hh)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a nonstick skillet over medium-high heat until hot.
2. Add garlic and cook for 30 seconds.
3. Add scallops; cook, stirring frequently, until opaque, about 4 minutes.
4. Add pineapple, chopped basil, and gingerroot; stir well.
5. Combine water and cornstarch; add to the skillet mixture.
6. Bring to a boil and cook for 1 minute or until thickened, stirring constantly.
7. Serve over rice. Garnish with basil if desired.
Per serving (1/2 cup scallop mixture and 1/2 cup rice): 249 calories (8% from fat).
